authority.pattern: train-only findings artifact; no contract surface

primary_f1_mean_dlog.exact_gate_analog: weighted pooled mean of positive-to-positive adjacent biennial log changes over reference years 2010/2012/2014
primary_f1_mean_dlog.label: primary F1 mechanism split

secondary_lag2_autocorrelation.exact_gate_analog: weighted Pearson correlation of positive log earnings at lag 2 on the biennial 2010/2012/2014 grid
secondary_lag2_autocorrelation.label: secondary

information_boundary.collection_wave_2015_use: income-reference year 2014 labor fields and incumbent collection-wave covariates only

source_audit.dating_note: family labor-income levels are field-dated by their verified income-reference year. For the amendment-required 2014 earnings row, the incumbent family-panel convention reads the 2015 collection-wave age, sequence, relationship, weight, and interview fields: relationship/interview attach the two family labor fields, sequence defines presence, and age/weight enter support and reduction. This is the sole collection wave above 2014; no 2015 earnings-reference field is requested
source_audit.nawi_read_policy: no NAWI value is loaded during source assembly; each q-by-boundary cell performs an unbuffered prefix read that stops at that exact b and asserts its frozen prefix and mapping hashes

psid_field_read.individual_reader: panels.ind_person_period with an explicit collection-wave list

provenance.estimation_rule: forward earnings income-reference period <=T*; age 25-64; calendar-invariant NAWI-normalized marginal

support.full_anchor_definition: positive-weight demographic roster at exact collection wave b+1

protocol.routing_note: section 5.1 defines no numerical predominantly/mixed cutoff; this findings artifact reports components without inventing one
protocol.share_convention: signed component / signed gap * 100; shares are not clamped and can lie outside [0,100] when the swap over-closes or moves against the gap
protocol.sign_convention: gap = truth - candidate; index-explained = candidate under realized index - candidate under projected index; residual = truth - candidate under realized index

validity_caveats_verbatim: (i) the evaluated waves sat inside q*'s selection evidence, so it is not out-of-sample with respect to the engine's selection; (ii) an error specific to the 2016/2018 scored regime cannot manifest in a ≤2014 window, so any routing carries regime-mismatch risk.
